texto: It is my hope that this book will help to demystify the origins of travel writing and show that when thousands of travelers follow a guidebook word-for-word, recommendation-for-recommendation, it not only harms contemporary international travel but can also do serious harm to places in developing countries.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Thomas Kohnstamm sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “It is my hope that this book will help to demystify the origins of travel writing and show that w…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, responsible-travel, travel, útil em momentos de viagem e termino.
